message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam note {
  BackgroundColor #FFFFE0
  BorderColor #FFD700
}

package "IP Layer" {
  [IPv4 layer]
  [Routing table] as rt
}

package "IPv4 Ineterface" {
  [IPv4 interface]
  [ARP] as arp
}

actor "Upper layer" as ul
actor "Lower layer" as ll
database "tuple" as tuple
database "Routing table" as rt_db
database "ARP" as arp_db

note left of ul
IPv4.dst=192.0.2.1
IPv4.src=198.51.100.2
end note

note left of IPv4 layer
IPv4.oif=ifp1
IPv4.gw=198.51.100.1
end note

note right of IPv4 layer
Allocate IPv4 header
end note

note right of ARP
enqueue packet
end note

ul --> IPv4 layer : IPdata
IPv4 layer --> rt : dst=192.0.2.1
rt --> IPv4 layer : 
IPv4 layer --> ARP : gw=198.51.100.1
ARP --> ARP : 
ARP --> IPv4 interface : ARP request
IPv4 interface --> ARP : ARP response
ARP --> IPv4 interface : resolved packets
IPv4 interface --> IPv4 interface : send as send thread
IPv4 interface --> ll : 

@enduml
